requirementsBento.title: Academic Transcripts
requirementsBento.description: SEBON / NEB marksheets and character certificates from previous institutions.

requirementsBento.title: Minimum GPA
requirementsBento.description: Eligible candidates typically hold a minimum second division or equivalent.

requirementsBento.title: Entrance Exam
requirementsBento.description: Written test covering mathematics, logic, and general aptitude.

requirementsBento.title: Interview Round
requirementsBento.description: Shortlisted applicants meet the admissions panel for program fit assessment.

admissionSteps.title: Review eligibility
admissionSteps.description: Confirm you meet academic requirements for BIT or B.Tech Ed IT before applying.
admissionSteps.hint: Most applicants should have completed +2 or equivalent. BIT is best for students with a strong maths/IT foundation; B.Tech Ed IT welcomes future educators with a technology focus.

admissionSteps.title: Submit application
admissionSteps.description: Fill out the online form with personal details, program choice, and supporting documents.

admissionSteps.title: Entrance assessment
admissionSteps.description: Take the admission test and attend the interview on your scheduled date.

admissionSteps.title: Receive offer
admissionSteps.description: Successful candidates receive an offer letter with enrollment and fee payment instructions.

deadlines.title: Early application closes
deadlines.description: Submit your form early for priority scheduling of entrance exams.

deadlines.title: Regular deadline
deadlines.description: Final date for standard intake applications for the 2026 academic year.

deadlines.title: Enrollment week
deadlines.description: Confirm your seat, complete orientation, and begin your first semester.

supportServices.title: Application help
supportServices.description: Walkthroughs for online forms, document uploads, and program selection.

supportServices.title: Document checklist
supportServices.description: Personalized list of required papers based on your academic background.

supportServices.title: Exam scheduling
supportServices.description: Flexible entrance exam slots with advance notice and preparation tips.

supportServices.title: Program counseling
supportServices.description: One-on-one sessions to choose between BIT and B.Tech Ed IT.

faq.question: Who can apply to WCBT?
faq.answer: Students who have completed +2 or equivalent in Science, Management, or related streams with minimum eligibility as per Kathmandu University guidelines.

faq.question: Is there an entrance exam?
faq.answer: Yes. All applicants take a written entrance test followed by an interview. Sample guidelines are shared after application submission.

faq.question: Can I apply for both BIT and B.Tech Ed IT?
faq.answer: You select a primary program on the application. Contact admissions if you need guidance on choosing the right pathway.

faq.question: What documents are required?
faq.answer: Academic certificates, transcripts, citizenship or passport copy, passport-size photos, and any additional documents listed in the offer letter.
